metadata.name: Swarm Orchestrator
metadata.description: Verification and governance layer for AI coding agents: parallel execution with evidence-based verification, quality gates, cost governance, and persistent learning.
metadata.author: Bradley R. Kinnard

tools.name: swarm_status
tools.description: Get current orchestrator status and recent run summary

tools.name: swarm_plan
tools.description: Generate an execution plan for a goal

tools.name: swarm_gates
tools.description: Run quality gates (lint, type-check, test coverage, security, complexity, documentation) on a path

tools.name: swarm_export_agents
tools.description: Export agents as .agent.md files from execution history

resources.name: Execution Runs
resources.description: List of all swarm execution runs with status

resources.name: Run Detail
resources.description: Detailed status of a specific execution run

resources.name: Step Detail
resources.description: Individual step detail with transcript and evidence

resources.name: Knowledge Base
resources.description: Aggregated knowledge base from execution history
